title: Rocket Lab Stock Forecast 2026 - What Financial Analysts Expect Right Now
text: According to 14 analysts, RKLB has a Buy consensus rating as of May 2026. 50% of analysts recommend a Strong Buy, 36% recommend Buy, 14% suggest Holding, 0% advise Selling, and 0% predict a Strong Sell. Wall Street analysts have set a price target of $91.07. However, price targets vary significantly across sources. Analysts have set an average price target of $100.17 in the past 3 months with estimates ranging from $60.00 to $150.00. Following strong Q1 2026 earnings results, several analysts raised their price targets. Citizens JMP analyst Trevor Walsh raised his price target on RKLB stock to $95 from $85 while maintaining a Buy rating. Cantor Fitzgerald's Andres Sheppard raised his price target to $96 from $85 while maintaining an Overweight rating. Deutsche Bank raised Rocket Lab price target to $120 from $73, and TD Cowen raised it to $120 from $90. Strong demand for its Electron launch business, growing defense contracts, and progress on the upcoming Neutron rocket have led analysts to raise their price targets.
